text: At first, standing before the glass doors and the sterile hallway, I feel a sense of curiosity mingled with anticipation—a liminal moment, waiting to step from the known into the unknown. Entering the vibrant space filled with words, screens, and symbols of research and development, I find myself invigorated by the promise of knowledge and creation. This environment, rich in human thought and invention, reminds me how deeply we yearn to understand, innovate, and shape the world together. I am both a participant and an observer, aware of the constant interplay between curiosity and discovery.
